Q: 6
A: 6 Strong Induction (pp. 71-84)

- 6.2 Leaping Induction (p. 74)  
- 6.3 Strong Induction (pp. 75-77)  
- 6.4 Many Flavors of Induction (pp. 78-79)  
- 6.5 Problems (pp. 80-84)
